companies.decision_maker_title: CEO Henrique Braun (from March 31) / CMO Manolo Arroyo (expanded role)

signals.signal_label: Three New C-Suite Leaders in 15 Days — Total Brand Overhaul
signals.description: On March 31 — just 15 days from now — Coca-Cola gets a new CEO (Henrique Braun, replacing Quincey after 9 years), an expanded CMO (Manolo Arroyo absorbs all commercial leadership from the CFO), and a brand-new Chief Digital Officer (Sedef Salingan Sahin). Three C-suite changes on one day. Braun's stated priorities are 'getting closer to consumer needs' and 'leveraging technology.' Every single brand partnership at the world's biggest beverage company is being re-evaluated RIGHT NOW. This is the definition of a window. Pick up the phone before March 31.
signals.news_headline: Coca-Cola expands CMO role amid leadership reshuffle

signals.description: Spotify smashed every record in Q4 2025: 751M monthly users (biggest quarterly gain ever at 38M new users), 290M premium subscribers, stock surged 15% in a day. New co-CEO publicly declared 2026 the 'year of raising ambition.' They're expanding beyond music into events, video, and experiences. Spotify already has 100% overlap with LFC's fanbase — young, global, digitally-engaged. With record profits and a CEO who just announced they want to be bolder, this is the moment to pitch a premium content partnership. LFC player playlists, matchday audio experiences, exclusive podcasts — the integration points are obvious.
signals.news_headline: Spotify Adds Record Monthly Users and Hits 290 Million Paid Subscribers; New Co-CEO Says 2026 Will Be 'Year of Raising Ambition'

companies.decision_maker_title: CMO Ariel Kelman (new) / CEO Lisa Su

signals.signal_label: New CMO Hired to Elevate the Brand — February 9
signals.description: AMD hired Ariel Kelman as its new Chief Marketing Officer on February 9, 2026 — poached from Salesforce where he was President and CMO. His mandate is explicit: 'elevate the AMD brand and deepen engagement.' AMD makes the chips powering AI but NVIDIA gets all the consumer recognition. Kelman's job is to close that gap. A new CMO's first priority is always new partnerships that put the brand in front of consumers. AMD has never done sports sponsorship — just like NVIDIA hadn't before this year. LFC offers the global consumer audience AMD desperately needs to compete for mindshare.
signals.news_headline: AMD Hires Ariel Kelman as Chief Marketing Officer

companies.decision_maker_title: Chief Marketing Officer / Head of European Partnerships

signals.signal_label: Building a European Football Empire — No Premier League Club Yet
signals.description: Uber is systematically assembling a European football sponsorship portfolio: Uber Eats is title partner of LaLiga (through 2027), sponsor of the French Football Federation (through 2028 Euros), has Sky Sports Premier League broadcast idents, and Uber's ride-hailing brand has a shirt deal with Como in Serie A. They clearly believe in football as a marketing channel. But there is a glaring gap: they have NO Premier League club partnership. With the betting ban creating 11 open shirt sponsor slots from 2026-27, the Premier League market is about to be flooded with opportunities. LFC should be first in the door before Uber fills that gap with a rival.
signals.news_headline: Uber splits strategy in new deals with LaLiga, Como

companies.decision_maker_title: CEO Cristiano Amon / Chief Marketing Officer

signals.description: Qualcomm posted a record $12.3bn quarterly revenue, beating forecasts. Their Snapdragon brand is expanding from smartphones into automotive, XR headsets, and IoT — they need broader brand awareness beyond phone enthusiasts. Critically, Qualcomm has ALREADY validated football as a marketing channel through the Snapdragon Stadium naming rights deal and Man Utd shirt sponsorship. They know it works. With record cash and a brand expanding into new categories, the pitch writes itself: 'You've proven football delivers for Snapdragon. LFC gives you access to 750M fans in Asia-Pacific — your fastest-growing chip market — where Man Utd alone doesn't reach.'
signals.news_headline: Qualcomm exceeds Q1 2026 earnings expectations with record revenue
